examples.reason: Middle Class Borrower Protection Act — eliminates FHFA fee structure that charged higher-credit borrowers more to cross-subsidize lower-credit borrowers. Realtors and mortgage lenders supported this as it reduces costs for their core buyer demographic.

examples.vote_description: End Chinese Dominance of Electric Vehicles in America Act
examples.reason: End Chinese Dominance of Electric Vehicles in America Act — restricts EV tax credits for Chinese-connected vehicles. Auto dealers support this as it slows the EV transition that threatens their service revenue model.

examples.vote_description: To designate the United States Courthouse and Federal Building located at 111 North Adams Street in Tallahassee, Florida, as the “Joseph Woodrow Hatchett United States Courthouse and Federal Building”
examples.reason: Bipartisan Safer Communities Act — NRA opposed this as it enhances background checks for under-21 buyers, funds state red flag laws, and closes the boyfriend loophole. NRA lobbied against passage.

examples.vote_description: Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act
examples.reason: Financial Innovation and Technology for the 21st Century Act (FIT21) — comprehensive crypto regulation that creates SEC/CFTC framework favorable to financial industry participation in digital assets.

examples.vote_description: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act
examples.reason: Protecting Prudent Investment of Retirement Savings Act — despite the name, this ROLLS BACK the DOL ESG investing rule, restricting how pension funds (including union pension funds) can consider environmental and social factors when investing. Unions strongly opposed this bill.

highlights.issue: Universal background checks for gun purchases
Build a wall on the U.S.-Mexico border
Require permits to carry concealed guns
